headline: CarMax Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
summary: CarMax (KMX) will report Q1 earnings on June 17. Analysts expect EPS of 94 cents on revenue of $7.42B. Last year, it reported $7.55B in revenue.
